'''Rafael Ferrer''' (born [[March 23]], [[1960s#1960|1960]]) is an American actor and voice actor who voiced [[Darth Malak]] in the video games ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' (the latter as part of a Force vision experienced by the player's character on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]])

==Biography==
Ferrer is the son of [[Wikipedia:José Ferrer|José Ferrer]] and [[Wikipedia:Rosemary Clooney|Rosemary Clooney]], brother of [[Wikipedia:Miguel Ferrer|Miguel Ferrer]], and cousin of [[Wikipedia:George Clooney|George Clooney]]. He has split his life between New York and Los Angeles. Ferrer began primarily as a theater actor, but later switched to focusing on voice acting and narration.

Ferrer has narrated commercials for such high profile clients as Subaru, Ford, Miller Beer and Smith Barney. He has also recorded network promos for every major broadcast and cable network, as well as movie trailers for most Hollywood studios.

==''Star Wars'' voice work==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', [[Darth Malak]]
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', [[Darth Malak]]
